Yoga · Strength · Stillness

Find Your
Flow

A mindful yoga experience designed to build strength, deepen flexibility, and quiet the noise. Step onto the mat and reconnect with yourself.

The Practice
What to Expect
Every class is a journey — from the first breath to the final savasana.
Breathe deeply.
Move freely.
01

Dynamic Flow

Move through creative vinyasa sequences that build heat and challenge your body with intention and grace.

02

Functional Strength

Integrated bodyweight holds and balances that sculpt lean muscle and improve stability from the inside out.

03

Breathwork & Stillness

Guided pranayama and meditation to calm the nervous system and leave you grounded, clear, and restored.

All Levels Welcome
Bring Your Mat
60 Minutes
Wear Comfy Clothes

Before You Arrive
Class Details
Everything you need to know to make the most of your practice.
🧘

All Levels Welcome

Whether you've never touched a mat or you're a seasoned practitioner, every pose offers modifications. Come as you are — your body, your pace.

🎒

What to Bring

Your yoga mat, a water bottle, and a towel. Wear clothes you can move freely in. Blocks and straps are provided if you need them.

⏱

Class Format

60 minutes of guided flow. We begin with centering breathwork, move through a dynamic sequence, and close with deep stretching and savasana.

"This class changed the way I move through my day. I came for the workout and stayed for the peace of mind."
— Alicia M., Student
Reserve Your Mat
Get Your Ticket
Secure your spot in the next Fit Yoga class. Limited spaces to keep it intimate.

per class
